metadata.name: Create a Quote for a Custom Product

description: A sales rep is working with engineering to create a quote for a new, custom-configured product.

nodes.task_description: Use the product configurator tool to select the required features and options for the custom product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent builds the custom product configuration.

nodes.task_description: Generate a cost estimate based on the selected configuration.

expected_outcome.value: The system calculates the total material and labor cost for the custom product.

nodes.task_description: Create a formal quote with the calculated price, the configuration details, and an estimated lead time.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates and sends the detailed quote for the custom item.
